title: Capture Atoms
description: Extract named values from parsed input using capture atoms. Like named groups in regex, but integrated into the parsing grammar.

motivation.why: Captures allow extracting specific fields from parsed input without building a full AST. This is more efficient for simple extraction tasks.
useCases: Parsing log files for specific fields (IP, status, timestamp)
Parsing CSV exports for data migration
Field extraction without full AST construction

inputFormat.description: Any structured text with fields to extract.

outputFormat.description: Named captures accessible via the capture inspection API.

get_capture.description: Get text of a named capture
